title: Cobblemon Atlantia
description: The server modpack for Cobblemon Atlantia 🌊🐬
body:
![Lugia Loves This Server!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee949f644d025decd3e24388314fe519fc4b8c49.png)
![Border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/854ec10d3aed5116430bec1d4b12b5aea2367ee4_0.webp)

## Server Features
Take your **starter**, your backpack and your pokedex today!    

**Fly** along with your favourite Pokémon and increase your **friendship** with them!

Become a Gym Leader or even the Very **Best**!

Obtain **Free** ranks and crate keys by voting, supporting and being **active** on the server!

Wait, what is that s-sound..? A LUGIA!? Yes, you heard it here first. **Legendary** Pokémon Spawn Here and there.


Get in and discover!

Join our **[Discord](https://discord.gg/cobblemonatlantia)**!
